name: Here We Exist
short_description: Here We Exist is a path that seeks for purpose and meaning, wander around a strange world where everything has a purpose, but nothing makes sense, talk with strange creatures, fullfil your destiny.
detailed_description:
The game is a narrative-driven platform game, developed through scenarios and interactions with a strange and distorted world, which is observed by a young boy who has woken up in a familiar yet strange place.

Discover the vastness of a world spawned under strange circumstances, eternal yet volatile.

Talk with strange creatures, battle powerful demons, make your way in this world, you have one chance to make it right.
